untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'fundamental report released' event and 'initial directional reaction', which are external event triggers not present in the allowed technical indicators. The core concept—waiting for price failure to confirm market expectation—can be partially captured via reversal logic (close reversal + failure to make new extreme), but the fundamental event detection itself cannot be expressed using only technical price/volume indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture the reversal-on-failed-extreme concept: entry triggers when price reverses from initial reaction while failing to make a new high/low within 1 bar. This is a technical proxy for the signal's intent, but the fundamental report timing event cannot be automated without external data feeds or news sentiment indicators.
